Ntc Of Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim;
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela Underwood, Esq., Assistant District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9544, appearing for the petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Pamela A. Underwood of District Attorney Office, (415-551-9544) appearing for petitioner.
No appearance for respondent.

Tentative Ruling is adopted - PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petittioners' First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents is granted. Order signed in open court. Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem, Nils Rosenquest Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)
